flow: 1. Ensure Administrator rights; relaunch elevated when needed.
2. Kill old H-OTA Studio processes for a clean start.
3. Launch H-OTA Studio from H-OTA Studio.lnk next to this script.
4. Find the H-OTA/ReprogramEditor window, foreground it, and maximize it.
5. Send Ctrl+O and load the only *.hcfg-r file from H-OTA config folder 0.
6. Click TesterMode.
7. Set Gateway Type to "CCU1 : EthDiag".
8. Select Wireless-Rules and click Apply for Scenario Units.
9. Click Start in Action Rule.
10. Mirror new Output pane lines to the terminal while waiting.
11. Wait for the final H-OTA result popup.
12. If popup text contains success, set PythonCom::AppState = 3;
otherwise set PythonCom::AppState = 4.
13. Capture the H-OTA window and every monitor into Report/.
14. Close H-OTA Studio after screenshots, then wait 30s and rename any current-run LOGASC\*.asc to
LOGASC\<original>_<script_name>_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.asc.
1. Ensure Administrator rights; relaunch elevated when needed.

7. Set Gateway Type to "CCU1 : EthDiag".

11. When Output reports Pre-Procedure Rule Start, set PythonCom::AppState = 12.
12. Continue waiting for the final H-OTA result popup.
13. If popup text contains success, set PythonCom::AppState = 3;
otherwise set PythonCom::AppState = 4.
14. Capture the H-OTA window and every monitor into Report/.
15. Close H-OTA Studio after screenshots, then wait 30s and rename any current-run LOGASC\*.asc to
LOGASC\<original>_<script_name>_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.asc.

1. Ensure Administrator rights; relaunch elevated when needed.
2. Kill old H-OTA Studio processes for a clean start.
3. Launch H-OTA Studio from H-OTA Studio.lnk next to this script.
4. Find the H-OTA/ReprogramEditor window, foreground it, and maximize it.
5. Send Ctrl+O and load the only *.hcfg-r file from H-OTA config folder 1.
6. Click TesterMode.
7. Set Gateway Type to "CCU1 : EthDiag".
8. Select Wireless-Rules and click Apply for Scenario Units.
9. Click Start in Action Rule.
10. Mirror new Output pane lines to the terminal while waiting.
11. When Output reports CommunicationControl or Activate-Rule, set
PythonCom::AppState = 9, capture _half screenshots, close H-OTA Studio,
and return immediately.
12. If no early return happened, continue waiting for the final result popup.
13. If popup text contains success, set PythonCom::AppState = 3;
otherwise set PythonCom::AppState = 4.
14. Capture the H-OTA window and every monitor into Report/.
15. Close H-OTA Studio after screenshots, then wait 30s and rename any current-run LOGASC\*.asc to
LOGASC\<original>_<script_name>_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.asc.
1. Ensure Administrator rights; relaunch elevated when needed.
2. Kill old H-OTA Studio processes for a clean start.
3. Launch H-OTA Studio from H-OTA Studio.lnk next to this script.
4. Find the H-OTA/ReprogramEditor window, foreground it, and maximize it.
5. Send Ctrl+O and load the only *.hcfg-r file from H-OTA config folder 1.
6. Click TesterMode.
7. Set Gateway Type to "CCU1 : EthDiag".
8. In Add Rule Units, check Add Pre Procedure, Add Activation,
and Add Post Procedure, then click Apply.
9. Click Start in Action Rule.
10. Mirror new Output pane lines to the terminal while waiting.
11. Wait for the final H-OTA result popup.
12. If popup text contains success, set PythonCom::AppState = 3;
otherwise set PythonCom::AppState = 4.
13. Capture the H-OTA window and every monitor into Report/.
14. Close H-OTA Studio after screenshots, then wait 30s and rename any current-run LOGASC\*.asc to
LOGASC\<original>_<script_name>_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.asc.
1. Ensure Administrator rights; relaunch elevated when needed.
2. Kill old H-OTA Studio processes for a clean start.
3. Launch H-OTA Studio from H-OTA Studio.lnk next to this script.
4. Find the H-OTA/ReprogramEditor window, foreground it, and maximize it.
5. Send Ctrl+O and load the only *.hcfg-r file from H-OTA config folder 1.
6. Click TesterMode.
7. Set Gateway Type to "CCU1 : EthDiag".
8. Select Wireless-Rules and click Apply for Scenario Units.
9. Click Start in Action Rule.
10. Mirror new Output pane lines to the terminal while waiting.
11. When Output contains activate-rule, wait for a later securityAccess
line, wait 5s, then set PythonCom::AppState = 10, capture _half screenshots,
close H-OTA Studio, and return immediately.
12. If no early return happened, continue waiting for the final result popup.
13. If popup text contains success, set PythonCom::AppState = 3;
otherwise set PythonCom::AppState = 4.
14. Capture the H-OTA window and every monitor into Report/.
15. Close H-OTA Studio after screenshots, then wait 30s and rename any current-run LOGASC\*.asc to
LOGASC\<original>_<script_name>_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.asc.

14. Capture the H-OTA window and every monitor into Report/.
15. Close H-OTA Studio after screenshots, then wait 30s and rename any current-run LOGASC\*.asc to
LOGASC\<original>_<script_name>_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.asc.
1. Ensure Administrator rights; relaunch elevated when needed.
2. Kill old H-OTA Studio processes for a clean start.
3. Launch H-OTA Studio from H-OTA Studio.lnk next to this script.
4. Find the H-OTA/ReprogramEditor window, foreground it, and maximize it.
5. Send Ctrl+O and load the only *.hcfg-r file from H-OTA config folder 2.
6. Click TesterMode.
7. Set Gateway Type to "CCU1 : EthDiag".
8. Select Wireless-Rules and click Apply for Scenario Units.
9. Click Start in Action Rule.
10. Mirror new Output pane lines to the terminal while waiting.
11. Wait for the final H-OTA result popup.
12. If popup text contains success, set PythonCom::AppState = 3;
otherwise set PythonCom::AppState = 4.
13. Capture the H-OTA window and every monitor into Report/.
14. Close H-OTA Studio after screenshots, then wait 30s and rename any current-run LOGASC\*.asc to
LOGASC\<original>_<script_name>_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.asc.
